ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
If(
    varUserRecord.role.Value in ["Super Admin", "Engineer"],
    If(
        varSelectedWorkOrder.status_workorder_dmp.Value in ["SUB"],
        DisplayMode.Edit,
        DisplayMode.Disabled
    ),
    DisplayMode.Disabled
)

IsBlank(
    LookUp(
        tbl_mrl_workorder_assign,
        workorder.Id = varSelectedWorkOrder.ID,
        workorder.Id
    )
)

IsBlank(
    LookUp(
        tbl_mrl_workorder_assign,
        workorder.Id = varSelectedWorkOrder.ID,
        workorder.Id
    )
)
